delhi_aqi.label: Delhi Air Quality (PM2.5, 2015-2024)
delhi_aqi.description: Daily PM2.5 concentrations. Test the 2020 lockdown effect.

ground_truth.notes: COVID lockdown caused immediate PM2.5 drop, recovered after 60 days

gst_revenue.label: India GST Revenue (Monthly, 2016-2023)
gst_revenue.description: Monthly GST collections. Test the GST implementation effect.

ground_truth.notes: GST implementation caused permanent revenue level shift

hospital_admissions.label: Hospital Admissions — Influenza (Weekly, 2018-2023)
hospital_admissions.description: Weekly flu admissions. Test the vaccine rollout effect.

ground_truth.notes: Vaccine rollout gradually reduced admissions over 8 weeks

electricity_demand.label: Electricity Demand (Hourly, 2022-2023)
electricity_demand.description: Hourly electricity demand. Test time-of-use pricing effect.

ground_truth.notes: Time-of-use pricing reduced peak-hour demand by 8%

crime_rates.label: Crime Rates — Monthly (2015-2023)
crime_rates.description: Monthly crime incidents. Test the community policing effect.

ground_truth.notes: Community policing program reduced monthly incidents

student_scores.label: Student Test Scores (Annual, 1984-2023)
student_scores.description: Annual average test scores. Test the new curriculum effect.

ground_truth.notes: New curriculum raised average scores by 5 points

traffic_accidents.label: Traffic Accidents (Daily, 2019-2023)
traffic_accidents.description: Daily traffic accidents. Test the roundabout installation effect.

website_sessions.label: Website Sessions (Daily, 2022-2023)
website_sessions.description: Daily website sessions. Test the marketing campaign effect.

ground_truth.notes: Marketing campaign gradually increased sessions over 30 days
